title: pyrus pyrifolia var. montana
intro: Pyrus pyrifolia var. montana, also known as Korean mountain pear, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to Korea and China. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating various health conditions such as fever, sore throat, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Pyrus pyrifolia var. montana include its ability to improve immune function, reduce stress, and aid in the treatment of respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in traditional medicine to make tonics and salves.
